title: The biggest park - Review of Golden Gate Park, San Francisco, CA
content: # The biggest park - Golden Gate Park. *   San Francisco - Things to Do. **#20** of 1,166 things to do in San Francisco. *   Image 4 1 ### SF: Hop-on Hop-off Sightseeing Tour with Optional Sunset Tour 4.1 (3,108) from $60. # The biggest park. Review of Golden Gate Park. This is the biggest park which I've visited in my life. this is all only inside the golden gate park !!!! *   Image 13 10 ### The Best of San Francisco eBike Tour 5.0 (16) from $104. The best Segway tour in San francisco. My father and I just did a 1.5 hour guided Segway tour of golden gate park. You follow the leader,on the Segway and they take you off-roading to see all the monuments and statues and flowers and shrubbery in the park. All in all, a fun way to spend time in golden gate park. It was a fun experience, and nice to see the park while not on foot.
